prs_created.description: ci: remove unused libxml2 dependency from Linux and macOS workflows

notes: No regular open issues in the repo. Previous PRs #4 and #5 were closed by maintainer (changes applied directly to master). All 3 suggested actions from last run were checked off by maintainer. PR #6 is open: remove libxml2 from CI. Task 2 was a no-op this run (no non-bot issues). Next run: check if PR #6 was reviewed; look for more CI improvements or test coverage gaps (accessor functions, creator, IDE, microdrive).
